task: Plan the remaining Screenslop engine work and keep Studio blocked until the engine is tested and proven.

ralplan_architect_review.summary: Approved after revisions. Plan keeps engine and Studio separated, hardens private dogfood with verified-fixed and redaction gates, and makes Studio block hard to bypass.

ralplan_critic_review.summary: Approved after revisions. Dogfood proof is now strict, testable, and cannot be replaced by fixture/sample proof.
